title: Oral thrush in cancer patients: 8 herbal teas for relief
description: Ginkgo biloba teas have been studied for their potential benefits in treating oral thrush, a fungal infection that causes white patches in the mouth. The teas contain flavonoids and terpenoids, which are compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties. These properties help to reduce the growth of Candida, the fungus that causes oral thrush, and alleviate symptoms such as pain, discomfort, and difficulty swallowing.
